issue: Radiator material field visible but unselectable when suelo-radiante is chosen
text: When heatingEmitterType === 'suelo-radiante', the radiator material field was still rendered in EnergyCertificateSection.tsx but with value 'no-aplica' (which is not in RADIATOR_MATERIAL_OPTIONS). This left the field appearing with no active button — confusing for assessors. Fix: wrap the SegmentedOptions in a conditional that hides the field entirely when heatingEmitterType === 'suelo-radiante'. Validation already skips the radiatorMaterial requirement for suelo-radiante, so this is purely a UX fix.
